transcript: Speaker A: Shashank dreams of skydiving and becoming an investment banker. UCLA में हुआ Shashank का admission. पर घर से आया SOS call. [Shashank got admission in UCLA. But an SOS call came from home.] Speaker B: Should I abandon my dreams after all? Speaker A: Shashank was determined to chase his dreams and chose the Duolingo English Test. The DET is accepted by top universities offering distance learning courses. Study abroad at over 6000+ universities worldwide.
on_screen_text: acceptance letter, SOS! come home!, duolingo english test, Shashank, Future Investment Banker, Southern New Hampshire University, USA, Study abroad at 6000+ universities worldwide
summary: The ad follows Shashank, who must stay home despite getting into UCLA. He uses the Duolingo English Test to enroll in distance learning programs at top global universities. It promotes the test's acceptance at over 6,000 institutions worldwide.
